modalContent: Developed with TypeScript, Fastify, and Next.js, NitrousOxide is a research project showcasing the fundamentals of open-source intelligence (OSINT) through HTTP requests to public APIs.
title: NitrousOxide

modalContent: A full-stack solution for authentication and authorization, built with Fastify, Next.js, and MongoDB, powering a seamless KYC-less crypto-to-fiat exchange platform.
title: VOLT
